beds.title: Anchor Reference — Candidate 3 — Festival Euphoria
beds.note: Keep this as the taste anchor from the previous batch: polished, driving, four-on-the-floor, euphoric club energy. The new options should be judged against this one.

beds.title: Latin Club Candidate 1 — Ritmo de la Noche
beds.note: Real downloaded ElevenLabs Latin track candidate. More Latin nightlife movement while staying polished enough for a Newport Beach fitness-club bed.

beds.title: Latin Club Candidate 2 — Afrobeat Celebration
beds.note: Real downloaded ElevenLabs Latin track candidate. Latin/reggaeton-adjacent background energy with more world rhythm and less generic commercial polish.

beds.title: Afro House Candidate 3 — Afro Soul Chant
beds.note: Real downloaded ElevenLabs house track candidate. Afro-house direction with a deeper club pulse and more cultural texture. Potentially closest to premium fitness lounge if it stays clean under dialogue.

beds.title: Fitness Club Candidate 4 — Ritmo Sintetico
beds.note: Real downloaded ElevenLabs aerobics track candidate. More four-on-the-floor workout drive with a Latin-coded title and higher fitness energy. Check that it does not feel too class-instructor.

beds.title: World Club Candidate 5 — Cyber Souk
beds.note: Real downloaded ElevenLabs aerobics track candidate. World/electronic club color with a compact runtime. Useful if we want a more ethnic edge without going full salsa or resort music.

beds.title: Foley Reference — Deep Magnetic Recumbent Bike Whir
beds.note: Existing bike layer only: deeper smooth electronic resistance whir with no percussive click. This should be tucked under the approved music in final mix.
